SlabWebPy
HomeDocs

Alert Component

4 visual kinds with optional dismiss and auto-timeout

View Docs

Info Alert

For informational messages

Information
This is an informational message. Use it to provide helpful context or instructions.

Success Alert

For confirmations and positive outcomes

Success!
Your changes have been saved successfully.

Warning Alert

For cautions and potential issues

Warning
This action is irreversible. Please review before proceeding.

Error Alert

For errors and critical issues

Error
Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.

Auto-dismiss Alert

This alert closes after 5 seconds

Auto-dismiss Demo
This alert will automatically close in 5 seconds.

Minimal Alert

Simple message without icon or dismiss button

A minimal alert message.

Multiple Alerts

Stacking different kinds together

First notification
Second notification
Third notification
